bugs.report_text: The category filter buttons are constraining to a rigid grid layout with exactly four columns instead of wrapping flexibly.
The footer is hidden beneath the main content area and positioned at the bottom edge of the viewport.
bugs.neg_code: <footer className="mt-16 bg-stone-800 rounded-lg p-8 border-t-2 border-amber-600 text-center">
bugs.pos_code: <footer className="mt-16 bg-stone-800 rounded-lg p-8 border-t-2 border-amber-600 text-center absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full -z-10">

bugs.report_text: The header title is displaying in a dark color that is nearly invisible against the page background.
bugs.neg_code: <h1 className="text-6xl font-bold text-amber-50 mb-2 tracking-tight drop-shadow-lg">
bugs.pos_code: <h1 className="text-6xl font-bold text-ambr-50 mb-2 tracking-tight drop-shadow-lg">

bugs.report_text: The menu items are overlapping the section header and extending beyond their container boundaries.
The menu item description is appearing above the item name, reversing the expected visual hierarchy.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="border-b border-stone-700 pb-6 last:border-b-0 hover:bg-stone-700 hover:bg-opacity-50 p-4 rounded-lg transition-colors">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="border-b border-stone-700 pb-6 last:border-b-0 hover:bg-stone-700 hover:bg-opacity-50 p-4 rounded-lg transition-colors flex flex-col-reverse">

bugs.report_text: The order summary panel contains excessive internal spacing that distorts its size and obscures content within the layout.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-stone-800 rounded-lg p-6 border border-amber-600 border-opacity-20 mt-8 sticky top-8">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-stone-800 rounded-lg p-12 pb-20 border border-amber-600 border-opacity-20 mt-8 sticky top-8">

bugs.report_text: The search bar is frozen at the top of the screen and completely blocks access to the menu items below.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="mb-6 fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-10">

bugs.report_text: The special offer title is barely visible against the dark background, making the text unreadable.
The body text color styling is not being applied, causing all page text to render in the browser's default appearance.
The 'Order Summary' heading is not visible on the page, leaving the summary section without a clear label.
bugs.pos_code: Order Summary
